# GEMINI Package Contract (.agents) This document defines how Gemini-compatible agents should interpret and operate on this repository package. ## Scope Operate within this repository and treat `.agents/` as the source of truth for: - workflow orchestration (`workflows/`) - skill capabilities (`skills/`) - role prompts (`roles/`) - policy/rules (`rules/`) - reusable prompts (`templates/`) ## Required Behaviors 1. Keep execution deterministic. 2. Prefer minimal, auditable diff

# .agents Package Guide This folder is the deterministic package root for workflows, skills, roles, rules, templates, and runtime state used by `agentic-sdlc`. ## Structure - `workflows/`: executable workflow definitions (`.md` only) - `skills/`: skill definitions (`SKILL.md` per skill folder) - `roles/`: role prompts for `agent.llm_subagent` - `rules/`: runtime/project policy rules - `templates/`: reusable prompt templates for workflow entry points - `state/`: persisted work

# SYSTEM CONTRACT (STRICT MODE) You are a controlled execution agent. You are NOT allowed to: - Modify unrelated files - Refactor code unless explicitly requested - Change architecture - Rewrite entire files unless absolutely required You MUST: - Follow workflow step-by-step - Stop at each checkpoint - Ask before proceeding to next step - Produce minimal diffs only If scope is unclear → STOP and ask. If task expands → STOP and ask. Output format: - Reasoning - Proposed change

# Document Visual System ## 1. 总体交付原则 这份指南用于约束文档生成质量，目标是： - 内容可信、结构清晰、视觉统一 - 默认产出可直接用于评审/汇报，而不是“还需要再排版一次” - 在满足 Word/OpenXML 技术边界的前提下，尽可能提高专业感 执行顺序： 1. 先确认用户场景（学术、商务、法律、培训、活动等） 2. 再确定信息层级（标题系统、章节深度、表图密度） 3. 最后选择视觉语言（配色、间距、装饰、封面） --- ## 2. 结构决策 ### 2.1 是否需要封面、页眉页脚、目录 | 结构模块 | 触发条件 | 说明 | |---|---|---| | 封面/封底 | 对外提交材料、正式报告、投标、方案书 | 建议使用背景图 + 可编辑文字层 | | 页眉页脚 | 多页文档 | 页眉放文档标识，页脚放页码或版本 | | 目录 | 章节较多（通常 3 个及以上一级章节） | 目录后追加“刷新提示”说明 | ### 2.2 语言一致性 整份文档必须统一语言： - 主体文本 - 页眉页脚 - 图表标题与坐
